description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern L-shaped kitchen unit with a combination of tall pantry cabinets, base cabinets, and wall-mounted cabinets. The surfaces are finished in a sleek, light gray with a marble-patterned countertop, and one tall cabinet door is highlighted in a vibrant green. Integrated appliances, such as an oven and microwave, are built into the tall section, while a stainless steel sink and a contemporary range hood are positioned along the countertop. Open shelving above the counter displays potted plants and small decor items, adding a touch of greenery. The cabinetry is supported by black legs, providing clearance from the floor and a modern aesthetic. The overall design is functional and visually striking, suitable for urban kitchens or communal spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with gray and green finishes, marble countertop, integrated appliances, and open shelving with decorative plants. The design combines tall pantry, base, and wall cabinets for a functional and stylish urban kitchen.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall pantry cabinet, marble countertop, and wall-mounted cabinets with a visible range hood.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open shelving with potted plants, integrated oven and microwave, and the marble countertop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the cabinetry, the sink, and the arrangement of the base and wall cabinets.
description_view_3: End view emphasizing the green tall cabinet door, black cabinet legs, and the open shelving with plants.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen suite with tall pantry, base cabinets, and wall cabinets
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, and open shelf
